Effective Date of Repeal, subdiv. B, title XXV, § 2503(d), , , provided that: [The Secretary of State did not make the required certification.]Pub. L. 105–277, div. G112 Stat. 2681–837Oct. 21, 1998“Unless Congress receives the certification described in subsection (a) [set out below] before , effective on that date the Act entitled ‘An Act to authorize participation by the United States in the Interparliamentary Union’, approved (–4) is repealed.”October 1, 1999June 28, 193522 U.S.C. 276–276a

Termination of United States Membership in Bureau of Interparliamentary Union, subdiv. B, title XXV, § 2503(a), , , provided that: [The Secretary of State did not make the required certification.]Pub. L. 105–277, div. G112 Stat. 2681–836Oct. 21, 1998“Unless the Secretary of State certifies to Congress that the United States will be assessed not more than $500,000 for its annual contribution to the Bureau of the Interparliamentary Union during fiscal year 1999, then effective , the authority for further participation by the United States in the Bureau shall terminate in accordance with subsection (d) [set out above].”October 1, 1999
